goal: Fix the full Python test collection blocker discovered during final program completion verification, without changing product behavior or release policy.
head: 9370aab
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add repo-local pytest collection configuration, fix the FE e2e script invocation flags, refresh current NOT_GO release-blocker review artifacts, update WORKING.md, and update this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Full pytest no longer fails during collection due duplicate test basenames
pnpm run e2e invokes Node with WebSocket support required by the CDP client
FE v6 route-contract tests still pass
Current v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
failed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest # failed before this gate: import file mismatch between tests/export and packages/agent-runtime/tests duplicate basenames
COREPACK_HOME=/tmp/corepack /tmp/mib-toolchain/node-v20.18.1-linux-x64/bin/node /tmp/corepack/v1/pnpm/9.15.0/bin/pnpm.cjs run e2e # failed before package.json fix and outside-sandbox Chrome execution

COREPACK_HOME=/tmp/corepack /tmp/mib-toolchain/node-v20.18.1-linux-x64/bin/node --experimental-websocket --test apps/desktop/e2e/fe_v6_route_contract.test.mjs # failed inside command sandbox because Chrome cannot run there
warnings: M6-RC and v0 remain NOT_GO until real trained CUDA adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.
This gate fixes test collection and e2e invocation only; it does not edit product behavior or release verifier acceptance criteria.

phase_notes.plan: Use pytest importlib import mode to make duplicate basename tests collectible as distinct modules, and make the FE e2e npm script use Node WebSocket support required by the CDP client.
phase_notes.audit: Full pytest failed during collection because duplicate basename tests exist in both tests/export and packages/agent-runtime/tests. FE e2e also requires Chrome outside the command sandbox and Node --experimental-websocket for the CDP client.
phase_notes.build: Add repo-local pytest configuration, fix package.json e2e invocation flags, and update current working state after verification.
phase_notes.check: Full pytest passes with 193 tests, FE unit/build/M1 e2e/v6 e2e pass, bootstrap passes, and release recertification remains expected NOT_GO.
phase_notes.done: Ready to stage, run git diff --cached --check, commit, and push this verified test harness fix.

pabcd.approved_scope: Fix full pytest collection configuration, FE e2e script invocation flags, refresh current NOT_GO release-blocker artifacts, update WORKING.md, and update PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
